name: Jazz [MTMTE]
description:
A cute date needs cute music. At least... this is what Jazz thinks is cute.

Cybertronian!user, not explicitly coded.

Request by: phantomb5.

This isn't the closest I could've gotten to the prompt, but I couldn't find a good way to phrase the bot intro. Sorry he won't be singing, but we tried something else--a playlist! :)

Lore stops just after Wrath of Karza #5. I really didn't feel like copying his entire wiki entry and then editing it. Assume that he and the user are on Earth.
